name: SMART on FHIR Token Theft and Bulk Exfiltration
description: Adversary steals OAuth tokens from compromised partner app and performs patient record extraction.
attack_path: Initial access via partner app -> token capture -> FHIR bulk read
clinical_impact: Loss of confidentiality and possible care disruption if accounts suspended.
business_impact: Regulatory penalties, forensic cost, partner ecosystem disruption.

name: FHIR Bulk Data Exfiltration via Scope Escalation
description: Over-permissive SMART on FHIR scopes allow large-scale extraction of patient records.
attack_path: Compromised app registration -> excessive scopes -> bulk export API abuse
clinical_impact: Confidentiality breach and potential care disruption during credential revocation.
business_impact: Large breach notifications and regulator scrutiny.

name: HL7v2 Message Injection/Manipulation
description: Injected or tampered HL7v2 messages alter order/result workflows.
attack_path: Interface compromise -> crafted HL7v2 payload -> downstream processing
clinical_impact: Incorrect lab orders/results and delayed care decisions.
business_impact: Patient safety investigations and compliance violations.

name: EHR Data/Order Manipulation
description: Attacker alters medication orders, allergies, or chart data within the EHR.
attack_path: Privileged account compromise -> selective record alteration -> clinical decision impact
clinical_impact: Potential adverse events from incorrect treatment decisions.
business_impact: Severe legal liability and trust loss.

name: DICOM Metadata Exposure
description: Sensitive identifiers leak through DICOM header fields during export or third-party sharing.
attack_path: Improper sanitization -> external transfer -> metadata disclosure
clinical_impact: Patient privacy violations with potential treatment stigma exposure.
business_impact: Mandatory breach notifications and trust erosion.

name: IoMT Ransomware Impacting Clinical Operations
description: Ransomware traverses from IT network to IoMT segments causing device and workflow outage.
attack_path: Phishing foothold -> lateral movement -> IoMT management compromise -> downtime
clinical_impact: Delayed procedures, patient diversion, increased clinical risk.
business_impact: Operational shutdown, legal exposure, recovery cost.

name: Medical Device Firmware Manipulation
description: Compromised firmware or update channel changes device/software behavior.
attack_path: Supply chain compromise -> malicious firmware/update package -> unsafe runtime behavior
clinical_impact: Direct patient safety risk from altered device operation.
business_impact: Regulatory enforcement and potential recalls.

name: IHE XUA/IUA Token Forgery
description: Forged federation tokens bypass trust assumptions in cross-organization exchange.
attack_path: Token validation weakness -> forged assertion -> unauthorized record access
clinical_impact: Unauthorized cross-organization data disclosure.
business_impact: Multi-party incident response and legal exposure.

name: E-Prescribing Diversion and Fraud
description: Credential abuse or workflow tampering enables fraudulent controlled-substance prescriptions.
attack_path: Prescriber credential compromise -> unauthorized scripts -> dispense diversion
clinical_impact: Patient harm and treatment disruption.
business_impact: Regulatory penalties and criminal exposure.

name: Clinical AI Training Data Poisoning
description: Poisoned training data degrades model reliability and can bias clinical recommendations.
attack_path: Data pipeline compromise -> poisoned training set -> unsafe model deployment
clinical_impact: Misdiagnosis or unsafe triage recommendations.
business_impact: High-risk AI non-compliance and potential patient harm claims.

name: Telehealth Account Takeover
description: Compromised patient or clinician accounts allow unauthorized session access and records retrieval.
attack_path: Credential stuffing/phishing -> session takeover -> unauthorized consultation access
clinical_impact: Exposure of sensitive consultations and continuity disruption.
business_impact: Privacy violations and reputational harm.

name: Genomic/Biobank Dataset Theft
description: Targeted exfiltration of genomic and research-linked biospecimen data.
attack_path: Compromised research account -> bulk export -> secondary monetization
clinical_impact: Potential re-identification and patient trust erosion.
business_impact: Breach reporting, research disruption, and legal action.

name: DICOMweb Query Enumeration and Imaging Scrape
description: Adversary abuses DICOMweb query/retrieve APIs to enumerate studies and exfiltrate image metadata and payloads.
attack_path: Token/API credential misuse -> QIDO/WADO query chaining -> large-scale imaging extraction
clinical_impact: Exposure of radiology records may force workflow restrictions and delay access during incident response.
business_impact: Large confidentiality breach scope with significant legal and contractual exposure.

name: IEEE 11073 SDC Command Injection
description: Compromised service trust allows unauthorized control commands to connected bedside devices.
attack_path: Weak mutual trust configuration -> forged command service call -> unsafe device state transitions
clinical_impact: Potential direct patient-safety impact when device control or alarm behavior is manipulated.
business_impact: Regulatory escalation, patient safety investigation, and biomedical service disruption.

name: NCPDP Refill Replay and Medication Fraud
description: Replay or tampering of refill transactions drives unauthorized medication dispensing.
attack_path: E-prescribing message interception/replay -> fraudulent refill acceptance -> dispense abuse
clinical_impact: Incorrect medication continuity and possible controlled-substance misuse.
business_impact: Pharmacy fraud losses, compliance findings, and law-enforcement exposure.

name: X12 Claims Tampering in Clearinghouse Flows
description: Unauthorized modification of X12 healthcare transactions alters claim/payment integrity and member data.
attack_path: Compromised clearinghouse channel -> EDI payload alteration -> downstream adjudication errors
clinical_impact: Financial workflow disruption can delay authorizations and continuity-of-care operations.
business_impact: Revenue-cycle loss, payer disputes, and reportable integrity incidents.

name: Remote Monitoring Device Identity Spoofing
description: Attacker spoofs enrolled personal-health-device identity to inject false telemetry into care workflows.
attack_path: Enrollment weakness -> device identity spoof -> falsified observation ingestion
clinical_impact: Incorrect triage or treatment adjustment due to falsified vitals/telemetry.
business_impact: Patient harm liability, trust loss, and telehealth program disruption.

name: IHE XDS Registry Metadata Poisoning
description: Adversary manipulates document registry metadata to misroute retrieval requests or expose sensitive records.
attack_path: Compromised registry integration identity -> metadata alteration -> unauthorized cross-enterprise document access
clinical_impact: Clinicians may retrieve incorrect or incomplete records, impacting continuity-of-care decisions.
business_impact: Cross-organization trust degradation and major compliance/audit response burden.

name: Cross-Community Patient Identity Mismatch Abuse
description: Identity-discovery manipulation causes wrong-patient correlation across communities and unauthorized data disclosure.
attack_path: Patient discovery query tampering -> false identity match -> downstream document pull
clinical_impact: Wrong-patient data exposure and potential treatment decisions based on incorrect records.
business_impact: Severe privacy incidents with multi-party legal and governance implications.

name: openEHR Archetype/Template Tampering
description: Unauthorized archetype/template changes alter semantics or constraints of clinical entries in longitudinal records.
attack_path: Compromised governance account -> archetype/template modification -> downstream data integrity drift
clinical_impact: Clinical interpretation errors and incorrect decision support outcomes.
business_impact: Data integrity investigation cost, safety-event exposure, and regulatory scrutiny.

name: UDAP Dynamic Client Registration Abuse
description: Attacker abuses trust-chain or dynamic registration pathways to onboard malicious clients with excessive access.
attack_path: Trust anchor misuse -> rogue client registration -> unauthorized API and document access
clinical_impact: Broad confidential record exposure and potential operational disruptions from emergency revocation.
business_impact: Federation trust incident, partner-impact fallout, and compliance reporting obligations.

name: C-CDA Clinical Document Injection
description: Malicious or malformed C-CDA payloads are injected into inbound exchange channels and alter care context.
attack_path: Inbound document channel compromise -> crafted C-CDA payload -> downstream ingestion and chart contamination
clinical_impact: Potential misdiagnosis or incorrect treatment due to altered document content.
business_impact: Clinical safety escalation and substantial record-remediation efforts.

name: Clinical Terminology Service Poisoning
description: Compromise of terminology-service or value-set governance modifies SNOMED/LOINC/ICD mappings and corrupts downstream coding and clinical logic.
attack_path: Terminology admin/API compromise -> malicious value-set or mapping update -> EHR/LIS/CDS semantic drift and misclassification
clinical_impact: Wrong-code propagation can trigger unsafe CDS recommendations, wrong-patient cohorting, and treatment errors.
business_impact: Large-scale coding remediation, reimbursement disputes, and reportable integrity incidents.
mitigations: semantic drift detection with clinician validation loops

name: Healthcare Vendor Supply Chain Compromise
description: Compromise of EHR/device/clearinghouse vendor update or integration channels propagates downstream risk.
attack_path: Vendor compromise -> trusted integration abuse -> enterprise spread
clinical_impact: Widespread system outages and degraded care operations.
business_impact: Systemic incident scope and extended recovery timelines.
